CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( Patient_Account__r.Insurer_factor__c , "1"), "כללית" , IF( ISPICKVAL( Patient_Account__r.Insurer_factor__c , "2") , "מכבי" , IF( ISPICKVAL( Patient_Account__r.Insurer_factor__c , "3") , "מאוחדת" , IF( ISPICKVAL( Patient_Account__r.Insurer_factor__c , "4") , "לאומית" , IF( ISPICKVAL( Patient_Account__r.Insurer_factor__c , "36") , "ענף תקציבים", "פרטי" )))))
CustomField.label: Insurer factor
